ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "task_type" TEXT /* Type of task (e.g., news article, scientific paper) */,
  "num_reference_summaries" INTEGER /* Number of human-generated reference summaries for the task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the task was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the task was last updated */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the task started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the task ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the task (e.g., active, completed, paused) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the system */,
  "system_type" INTEGER /* ID of the system type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the system was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the system was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the system */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Name of the developer or team that created the system */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_systems_system_type FOREIGN KEY ("system_type") REFERENCES system_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "summaries" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the summary belongs to */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system that generated the summary */,
  "summary_text" TEXT /* Text of the summary */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the summary was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the summary was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the summary (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Number of words in the summary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_summaries_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_summaries_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reference_summaries" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference summary */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the reference summary belongs to */,
  "reference_text" TEXT /* Text of the reference summary */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the reference summary was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the reference summary was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reference summary (e.g., approved, pending) */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Number of words in the reference summary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reference_summaries_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the metric was last updated */,
  "range" TEXT /* Range of values the metric can take (e.g., 0-1, 0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the result belongs to */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system the result belongs to */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric used for evaluation */,
  "avg_recall" REAL /* Average recall score for the system on the task */,
  "avg_precision" REAL /* Average precision score for the system on the task */,
  "avg_f_score" REAL /* Average F-score for the system on the task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the result was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the result was last updated */,
  "additional_metrics" TEXT /* Additional metrics or notes about the evaluation */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the metric scores */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_results_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_results_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES evaluation_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_results_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* ID of the summary the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_summary_id FOREIGN KEY ("summary_id") REFERENCES summaries ("summary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the access event was logged */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the system type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the system type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the system type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the system type was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the system type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)
